summary: The available data do not indicate that MLE4901 has undergone phase III clinical trials; all mentioned drugs are evaluated within earlier phases of development without specific references to this compound reaching later-stage testing. Therefore, based solely on existing documentation, there is insufficient support for claiming Phase III enrollment involving MLE4901.
